steps.title: Find the target count
steps.content:
The pair must total $\frac{2}{5}$ of the $700$ flowers:
$$
\frac{2}{5}\cdot700=280
$$

steps.title: Compare the graph values
steps.content: From the graph, orchid has $100$ flowers and lily has $180$ flowers. Their total is $$ 100+180=280 $$ That equals the target count. The answer is B.
